name: Corn Bread Rolls
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to a moderate temperature of 350 - 400°F.
2. Grease two roll pans well.
3. Mix all ingredients in a large bowl until combined.
4. Pour batter into prepared pans, making sure they are evenly filled.
5. Bake until the rolls are light brown and cooked through.
6. Remove from oven and let cool on wire racks.
